title: Multi-Agent Coordination Policy Schema
description: Defines rules for multi-agent git coordination in managed repos. Ensures worktree isolation, branch hygiene, shared tree protection, and hook behavior.

version.description: Semantic version of the policy instance

rule.description: Isolation rule: each agent works in its own worktree

canonical_tree_commit.description: Whether commits are allowed in the canonical (shared) working tree

worktree_location.description: Where worktrees are created relative to the canonical repo

base_branch.description: All feature branches must be created from this branch

chaining_allowed.description: Whether branch chaining (branch from branch) is allowed

naming_patterns.description: Agent-specific branch naming patterns. Key=agent_id, value=pattern

shared_tree_protection.description: Protection rules for the canonical (shared) working tree

commit_blocked.description: Block commits in canonical tree when side worktrees exist

push_blocked.description: Block pushes from canonical tree when side worktrees exist

destructive_ops_blocked.description: Git operations that are blocked in the shared tree

hook_behavior.description: Git hook behavior configuration for canonical and worktree contexts

canonical_mode.description: Hook behavior in canonical tree: blocked (when side worktrees exist) or full gate chain

worktree_detection.description: Methods for detecting linked worktree context

light_mode_steps.description: Gate steps executed in worktree light mode

scope_aware_lint.description: Scope-aware lint behavior in light mode

toolchain_missing.description: Action when required toolchain (node, java) is not available

changed_scope_match.description: Action when staged files match a lint scope and toolchain is available

artifact_storage.description: Where gate artifacts are stored: worktree's own .cache or canonical .cache with namespacing

fingerprint_mode.description: Fingerprint computation modes for stale artifact detection

canonical.description: Full mode: staged + unstaged + untracked + HEAD + branch

worktree.description: Reduced mode: staged_diff + staged_paths + HEAD + branch + worktree_id
